name: Critical Elements Lithium Corporation
description: Critical Elements Lithium Corporation is a Canadian junior mining company focused on acquiring, exploring, and developing high-quality mining properties in Canada. The company's flagship project is the Rose Lithium-Tantalum Project located in the James Bay region of Quebec, which is highly prospective for lithium and tantalum. Critical Elements Lithium aims to become a reliable, large-scale supplier of high-purity lithium and tantalum to the rapidly growing electric vehicle and energy storage markets.
